one_liner: Devin is an AI coding agent platform with a comprehensive REST API, official MCP server, self-serve free tier, and service user authentication via Bearer tokens (cog_ prefix).

auth_methods.notes: Service User API Keys (cog_ prefix) - recommended for automation and CI/CD. Created at organization or enterprise level with RBAC role assignment.
Personal Access Tokens (PAT) with cog_ prefix - for human programmatic access. Currently in closed beta for non-SSO/non-enterprise accounts, requires contacting support.

self_serve_notes: Devin offers a Free tier for individuals with limited usage, access to Devin Review, DeepWiki, unlimited inline edits and Tab completions. Self-serve paid plans (Pro, Max, Teams) available with automatic quota refresh. Enterprise requires custom agreements. Service User API keys can be self-generated in organization/enterprise settings UI for users with appropriate permissions.

api_surface.notes: Devin provides a comprehensive REST API with enterprise (/v3/enterprise/*) and organization-level (/v3/organizations/*) endpoints covering sessions, playbooks, knowledge, schedules, repository management, analytics, audit logs, billing, and member management. Also offers an official MCP server at https://mcp.devin.ai/mcp.

evidence.supports: Service User API Keys (cog_ prefix) for authentication via Bearer token scheme. Personal Access Tokens in closed beta.
Enterprise and organization-level service users with RBAC. Self-serve API key generation in Settings UI. Comprehensive REST API endpoints for sessions, knowledge, playbooks, etc.
Free tier available for individuals with limited usage. Self-serve paid plans (Pro, Max, Teams) with quota-based billing.
Self-serve platform with free tier and automatic quota refresh for paid users. Extra usage can be purchased at model-specific API pricing.
